# services.auto-cpufreq

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.auto-cpufreq`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.auto-cpufreq.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable auto-cpufreq daemon. |
| `services.auto-cpufreq.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Configuration for `auto-cpufreq`. The available options can be found in [the example configuration file](https://github.com/AdnanHodzic/auto-cpufreq/blob/v3.0.0/auto-cpufreq.conf-example). |
